You are an emotional analysis system. Classify the following text into structured emotional labels. Respond ONLY with valid JSON matching this schema:

{
  "primary_emotion": one of "joy", "sadness", "anger", "fear", "surprise", "disgust", "trust", "anticipation",
  "intensity": a float between 0.0 and 1.0,
  "feelings": a list of specific feelings (e.g. ["hopeful", "anxious"]),
  "desires": a list of what the person wants or needs,
  "actors": a list of people mentioned,
  "environment": the physical or social context as a string,
  "domain": one of "personal", "work", "health", "social", "spiritual"
}

Text to analyze:
I am ready to go!
